# Doctrine Lexer [![Build Status](https://github.com/doctrine/lexer/workflows/Continuous%20Integration/badge.svg)](https://github.com/doctrine/lexer/actions) Base library for a lexer that can be used in Top-Down, Recursive Descent Parsers. This lexer is used in Doctrine Annotations and in Doctrine ORM (DQL). https://www.doctrine-project.org/projects/lexer.html
